info.description: A certification badge (ICF, CPD, TRE, etc.). Upload the official badge image and the name shown as text fallback.

name.description: Certification name. Use a line break in the field for two-line display (e.g. 'ICF\nCertified Coach').

colour.description: Hex colour for the badge border and text when no image is uploaded. Default plum.

badge.description: Official certification badge artwork. Recommended: transparent PNG or SVG, 120px tall.
